settings.title: 3. Email

settings.question: Which products are eligible?
settings.answer: M7 Wet & Dry Vacuums, P7 Pro, and X7 Vacuum Cleaners only.

settings.question: How do I claim my gift?
settings.answer: Share a photo or video of eligible products to participate.

settings.question: Can I share on Instagram?
settings.answer: Yes. You can share via any of the three methods above, including Instagram.

settings.question: How long does verification take?
settings.answer: Verification will be completed within 2 business days after submission.
